    private static global::System.Attribute[] __Attributes(int groupIndex)
    {
        switch (groupIndex)
        {
            case 0:
            {
                return
                [
                    new global::TUnit.Core.TestAttribute()
                ];
            }
            default:
                throw new global::System.ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(groupIndex));
        }
    }
